nasb.text: When they came to the threshing floor of Atad, which is beyond the Jordan, they lamented there with a very great and sorrowful lamentation; and he observed seven days mourning for his father.

esv.text: When they came to the threshing floor of Atad, which is beyond the Jordan, they lamented there with a very great and grievous lamentation, and he made a mourning for his father seven days.

cnv.text: 他們到了約旦河東岸的亞達禾場，就在那裡大大地哀悼痛哭。約瑟為他父親舉哀七天。

ccb.text: 他们来到约旦河附近的亚达麦场，在那里痛哭哀悼。约瑟为父亲守丧七天。

csbs.text: 他们来到约旦河对岸的亚达禾场，就在那里大大哀哭，哭得极其沉痛。约瑟为他父亲举哀七天。
